name_cn:
『Celine Celine』
CEL.INE TRIOMPHC FOLCO High-quality Saddle Bag, continuing the Triumph motif, brown trim made of top-grain calfskin, vintage crossbody, classic print that never looks outdated, lightweight and playful, durable and wear-resistant, symbolic, simple structure, adjustable leather strap
Style: 2179#
Size: 18.16.10cm
